setupFailures.conditional-lm-fresh-no-lm: cache doesn't answer If-Modified-Since from a fresh entry that has no stored Last-Modified (responds-to-conditionals family)
setupFailures.headers-store-Content-Range: a 200 carrying a Content-Range header is stored as a range window, invisible to plain requests
setupFailures.headers-store-Set-Cookie: Set-Cookie responses are never stored (shared-cache decision)
setupFailures.304-etag-update-response-Content-Range: Content-Range storage quirk keeps the revalidation setup from being established
setupFailures.304-etag-update-response-Set-Cookie: Set-Cookie responses are never stored, so there is nothing to revalidate
setupFailures.head-200-update: HEAD is keyed separately from GET; a HEAD response can't update the GET entry
setupFailures.head-410-update: HEAD is keyed separately from GET; a HEAD response can't update the GET entry
setupFailures.partial-use-headers: 206 entries are served only on byte-exact window matches; plain requests can't reuse partial-entry headers
setupFailures.partial-use-stored-headers: 206 entries are served only on byte-exact window matches; plain requests can't reuse partial-entry headers
